content.content:
1	# ============================================================
2	# Backend Dockerfile - Spring Boot (Multi-stage build)
3	# ============================================================
4	
5	# Stage 1: Build with Maven
6	FROM maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-21 AS build
7	WORKDIR /app
8	
9	# Copy POM first to cache dependencies
10	COPY pom.xml .
11	RUN mvn dependency:go-offline -B
12	
13	# Copy source and build
14	COPY src ./src
15	RUN mvn package -DskipTests -B
16	
17	# Stage 2: Runtime
18	FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-alpine
19	WORKDIR /app
20	
21	# Add non-root user for security
22	RUN addgroup -S appgroup && adduser -S appuser -G appgroup
23	
24	# Copy the built JAR
25	COPY --from=build /app/target/*.jar app.jar
26	
27	# Set ownership
28	RUN chown -R appuser:appgroup /app
29	
30	USER appuser
31	
32	EXPOSE 8080
33	
34	# Health check
35	HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --retries=3 --start-period=40s \
36	    CMD wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:8080/actuator/health || exit 1
37	
38	ENTRYPOINT ["java", \
39	    "-XX:+UseContainerSupport", \
40	    "-XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0", \
41	    "-Djava.security.egd=file:/dev/./urandom", \
42	    "-jar", "app.jar"]
